# Learning Entry Template

Use this template when documenting a new learning.

## Metadata

- **Date:** YYYY-MM-DD
- **Type:** skill | agent | workflow | reference
- **Source:** Discovery Diamond n / Implementation Diamond n / [other]
- **Confidence:** 🔴 Low | 🟡 Medium | 🟢 High

## Summary

1-2 sentence description of what was learned.

## Details

### Context
What situation produced this learning?

### Key Insight
What is the core learning?

### Implications
How does this change future actions?

## Related Learnings

- Link to related entries in registry.md
- Link to related skills or docs

## Action Items

- [ ] Create skill (if applicable)
- [ ] Update agent file (if applicable)
- [ ] Add to documentation (if applicable)
- [ ] Register in learnings/registry.md
